calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-003 harm latent forward model: shuffled-action ablation (EXQ-166c)
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-166b C2 criterion flaw (random-weights ablation out-of-distribution). SHUFFLED model trains on same data with actions permuted per batch -- in-distribution for harm_eval, zero action-conditional info. New C2: trained model discriminates approach vs retreat actions. Dry-run: C3/C4/C6 all pass at 3 eps.
